data.title: Update CLAUDE.md Architecture section with External Dependencies feature summary and manual:awaiting_user tag entry
data.description:
## What
Add two pieces of documentation to CLAUDE.md:
1. A sentence summarizing the External Dependencies planning feature (config-gated, planning.external_dependency_block_enabled, default off) in the Architecture section, referencing plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md as the schema source.
2. A manual:awaiting_user tag namespace entry documented adjacent to the existing design:awaiting_import entry in the Figma design collaboration paragraph or an immediately following sentence.

## File
CLAUDE.md (repo root)

## Insertion context
The existing Figma design collaboration entry (line ~103) documents design:awaiting_import alongside design:awaiting_review and design:approved. Add manual:awaiting_user as a sibling tag namespace entry in this vicinity, or append a new sentence immediately after. Add the External Dependencies feature summary as a new bold sentence in the Architecture section, following the existing pattern of config-gated feature entries.

## Done Definitions
- When complete, CLAUDE.md Architecture section contains a sentence summarizing the External Dependencies planning feature, referencing planning.external_dependency_block_enabled and plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- When complete, manual:awaiting_user tag namespace is documented adjacent to the design:awaiting_import entry
- When complete, check-skill-refs.sh passes on CLAUDE.md

## Testing
testing_mode: GREEN
Structural boundary test: grep CLAUDE.md for 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' and 'manual:awaiting_user' — both must be present.

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Follow CLAUDE.md Architecture section prose style (bold key term, one-sentence summary, config flag reference, doc pointer)
- [Maintainability] Do not duplicate schema content — reference the contract doc path, do not inline schema details
- [Maintainability] CLAUDE.md has strict bloat rules — keep entries to 1-2 sentences each
